lines.english: How fast did the winning car go?
lines.chinese: 获胜的赛车开得有多快？
lines.raw: How fast did the winning car go? | 获胜的赛车开得有多快？

lines.english: Once a year, a race is held for old cars.
lines.chinese: 每年一度，都会举行一次老爷车比赛。
lines.raw: Once a year, a race is held for old cars. | 每年一度，都会举行一次老爷车比赛。

lines.english: A lot of cars entered for this race last year and there was a great deal of excitement just before it began.
lines.chinese: 去年，许多汽车报名参加了这场比赛，比赛开始前气氛异常热烈。
lines.raw: A lot of cars entered for this race last year and there was a great deal of excitement just before it began. | 去年，许多汽车报名参加了这场比赛，比赛开始前气氛异常热烈。

lines.english: One of the most handsome cars was a Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost.
lines.chinese: 其中一辆最漂亮的车是劳斯莱斯“银灵”。
lines.raw: One of the most handsome cars was a Rolls-Royce Silver Ghost. | 其中一辆最漂亮的车是劳斯莱斯“银灵”。

lines.english: The most unusual car was a Benz which had only three wheels.
lines.chinese: 最不寻常的车是一辆只有三个轮子的奔驰车。
lines.raw: The most unusual car was a Benz which had only three wheels. | 最不寻常的车是一辆只有三个轮子的奔驰车。

lines.english: Built in 1885, it was the oldest car taking part.
lines.chinese: 它建于1885年，是参赛车辆中最老的一辆。
lines.raw: Built in 1885, it was the oldest car taking part. | 它建于1885年，是参赛车辆中最老的一辆。

lines.english: After a great many loud explosions, the race began.
lines.chinese: 在一阵阵巨大的轰鸣声之后，比赛开始了。
lines.raw: After a great many loud explosions, the race began. | 在一阵阵巨大的轰鸣声之后，比赛开始了。

lines.english: Many of the cars broke down on the course and some drivers spent more time under their cars than in them!
lines.chinese: 许多汽车在赛道上抛锚了，有些司机待在车底的时间比待在车里的时间还长！
lines.raw: Many of the cars broke down on the course and some drivers spent more time under their cars than in them! | 许多汽车在赛道上抛锚了，有些司机待在车底的时间比待在车里的时间还长！

lines.english: A few cars, however, completed the race.
lines.chinese: 然而，有几辆车完成了比赛。
lines.raw: A few cars, however, completed the race. | 然而，有几辆车完成了比赛。

lines.english: The winning car reached a speed of forty miles an hour -- much faster than any of its rivals.
lines.chinese: 获胜的赛车达到了每小时40英里的速度——比任何竞争对手都要快得多。
lines.raw: The winning car reached a speed of forty miles an hour -- much faster than any of its rivals. | 获胜的赛车达到了每小时40英里的速度——比任何竞争对手都要快得多。

lines.english: It sped downhill at the end of the race and its driver had a lot of trouble trying to stop it.
lines.chinese: 在比赛结束时，它向下冲刺，司机费了很大的劲才把它停下来。
lines.raw: It sped downhill at the end of the race and its driver had a lot of trouble trying to stop it. | 在比赛结束时，它向下冲刺，司机费了很大的劲才把它停下来。

lines.english: The race gave everyone a great deal of pleasure.
lines.chinese: 这场比赛给每个人带来了极大的乐趣。
lines.raw: The race gave everyone a great deal of pleasure. | 这场比赛给每个人带来了极大的乐趣。

lines.english: It was very different from modern car races but no less exciting.
lines.chinese: 它与现代汽车比赛大相径庭，但同样激动人心。
lines.raw: It was very different from modern car races but no less exciting. | 它与现代汽车比赛大相径庭，但同样激动人心。
